description: CompositionGrey sleeves kurta made of 100% cotton, with printed side panels, round neck with pintucks on the front bib and split side hemsFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this grey kurta from w! Look ethnically hip and fresh with its stylish printed side panels ,while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
